Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes the village of Hempstead, in the county of Nassau, to amortize over a period of 20 years, the payments made to village employees upon separation from employment
Summary: Authorizes the village of Hempstead, in the county of Nassau, to amortize over a period of 20 years, the payments made to village employees upon separation from employment.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the local finance law, in relation to authorizing the village of Hempstead, county of Nassau, to amortize the cost of payments to employees upon separation of service from the village
